scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "yarn workspace min_server dev" "yarn workspace client dev --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.mobile: yarn workspace min_server build && yarn workspace client build:mobile && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "yarn workspace min_server start" "yarn workspace client preview"
scripts.build: yarn workspace min_server build && yarn workspace client build
scripts.test: yarn workspace min_server test:run && yarn workspace client test:run
